trigger.reason: User requested cierre-conversacion after a hardening session.

conversation.objective: Close a deterministic skill hardening session.
conversation.scope: One active skill, PR evidence, local validation, and next handoff.

summary.description: The session merged one PR and selected the next failing skill for hardening.

completed_work.description: Merged the active PR after Quality Gates passed.
completed_work.completion_evidence: gh pr view reported state MERGED and merge commit.

decisions.description: Continue with exactly one active skill at a time.

open_tasks.description: Harden cierre-conversacion from a fresh branch.
open_tasks.next_action: Create branch, add deterministic assets, validate, and open PR.

learnings.description: Stashing stale mixed worktrees preserves recovery while removing process blockers.

risks.description: CI is unknown until the next PR is opened.

durable_update_plan.content_summary: Mark cierre-conversacion dod-complete only after validation evidence exists.

handoff.next_action: Fix the failing skill DoD, then rerun local validations.

guardian_decision.rationale: The next skill still has a failing DoD check.
